role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: Under normal circumstances, the fund will invest at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in the KraneShares CSI China Internet ETF (the “Underlying ETF”) and options, including FLexible EXchange® Options (“FLEX options”) that reference the underlying ETF. The fund is non-diversified.
